news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global COVID-19 cases have reached over 150 million, with the death toll surpassing 3 million. The United States remains the worst-hit country, with over 32 million confirmed cases and more than 575,000 deaths. India follows with over 18 million cases and 204,000 deaths. The situation in Brazil is also concerning, with over 14 million cases and 391,000 deaths reported. The distribution of vaccines has been uneven, with some countries facing challenges in accessing doses. The World Health Organization continues to emphasize the importance of vaccination efforts to control the spread of the virus and prevent further outbreaks.
news.headline: UMich's Rao compares tariffs to "running a race with a parachute"; stresses negative impact.

news.summary: Enact Holdings Inc., traded under NASD as ACT, is set to take the place of SolarWinds Corp., traded on NYSE as SWI, in the S&P SmallCap 600 index starting April 16. This transition will occur before the trading session opens on that day. Notably, Turn/River Capital is in the process of acquiring SolarWinds in a pending deal that is anticipated to be finalized shortly.
news.headline: Enact Holdings (ACT) to join S&P SmallCap 600, replacing SolarWinds (SWI) on April 16. Acquisition deal pending.

news.summary: In La Jolla, California on April 9, 2025, Acurion, formerly io9, revealed its rebranding in a move to match its changing goals and future visions. The company introduced a new brand identity alongside the naming of a new CEO as part of this strategic shift.
news.headline: Acurion (formerly io9) reveals rebranding, new leadership, and Series A fundraising launch on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Ethereum researcher Virgil Griffith was released from prison custody on April 9 and will stay in a halfway house for several weeks awaiting completion of his parole process. He was arrested in 2019 for giving a blockchain lecture in North Korea, accused of violating sanctions laws. Griffith's case reflects the conflict between blockchain devs and state powers amid the tech's potential to bypass financial controls. A US grand jury indicted him in Jan 2020 for violating the International Emergency Economic Powers Act, but his attorneys argued he shared publicly available info. Griffith eventually pleaded guilty in Sep 2021 and was initially sentenced to 63 months in prison with a $100,000 fine. In Apr 2024, a motion to reduce his sentence was filed, leading to a 56-month sentence. The legal battle showcased the challenges faced by those in the blockchain space when it comes to navigating government regulations.
news.headline: Ethereum researcher Virgil Griffith released from prison after controversial case; sentenced to 56 months, fined $100,000 in July 2024.

news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has increased to over 10 million globally. This significant milestone has been reached as several countries continue to see a surge in new infections. The death toll related to the virus has also risen to over 500,000 worldwide. Health officials are emphasizing the importance of preventive measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. The situation remains fluid as governments and health organizations work to contain the pandemic.

news.summary: A major accomplishment has been achieved by EnviTec Biogas in the U.S. market as they have successfully launched their largest anaerobic digestion plant in the country. The milestone was reached in Watertown, South Dakota on March 28, 2025. This development highlights the company's commitment to expanding its presence and operations in the U.S. The plant signifies a significant investment from the biogas specialist's U.S. subsidiary and underscores their dedication to sustainable energy solutions. The successful commissioning marks a pivotal moment for EnviTec Biogas, solidifying their position as a key player in the renewable energy sector.
news.headline: EnviTec Biogas completes its largest U.S. anaerobic digestion plant, enhancing partnership with SJI.

news.summary: UK Ministry of Justice is currently working on a project that involves utilizing personal data to pinpoint individuals who may be prone to committing a homicide. This initiative draws parallels to the concept portrayed in the movie "Minority Report." The technology being developed is aimed at predicting and preventing potential acts of violence before they occur, emphasizing the importance of data analysis in identifying individuals at risk.
news.headline: UK Govt developing 'Murder Prediction' AI system to identify potential killers using personal data. #BigBrother #privacy #AI

news.summary: The Merkel cell carcinoma sector is anticipated to experience consistent development, with a robust Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) expected from 2024 to 2034. This growth is forecasted across the 7 Major Marketplaces (7MM) and will be primarily propelled by the introduction of groundbreaking treatments such as IFx-2.0, NIDLEGY, and ITI-3000. Specific details regarding the market expansion were shared on April 9, 2025, in Las Vegas.
news.headline: Merkel Cell Carcinoma market to expand at 8.7% CAGR (2020-2034) driven by innovative therapies in 7MM.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that a total of 350 people were affected by a foodborne illness outbreak in the city. The outbreak was linked to a popular restaurant in the area, where 28 confirmed cases have been identified so far. Health officials are currently investigating the source of the outbreak and have advised residents to avoid dining at the restaurant until further notice. It is important for individuals who have experienced symptoms such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea after visiting the restaurant to seek medical attention immediately. The authorities are working to prevent any further cases and ensure the safety of the community.

news.summary: A prominent company, Ecovyst Inc. (NYSE: ECVT), headquartered in Wayne, Pennsylvania, specializing in advanced materials and catalysts, is set to hold a conference call and audio webcast on May 1, 2025, at 11:00. The session will be open to investors, stakeholders, and the public. This event signifies Ecovyst's commitment to transparency and open communication regarding its operations and future prospects.
news.headline: Ecovyst Inc. will host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1 at 11:00 a.m. ET, announced on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Aave's tokenholders have approved a governance proposal to conduct buybacks of its governance token, AAVE, starting with $4 million worth of tokens for one month, supported by over 99% of tokenholders. This move is part of a broader plan to repurchase $1 million worth of AAVE tokens weekly for six months. Following the announcement, AAVE token's price surged by over 13% on April 9, pushing the protocol's market capitalization over $2.1 billion. Aave, one of Web3's most popular DeFi protocols, has total value locked exceeding $17.5 billion. The DeFi space is witnessing a trend of protocols implementing buyback mechanisms to cater to tokenholder demands and provide a share of protocol revenues. This comes amidst a regulatory environment that favors DeFi protocols in the United States. Other projects like Ethena, Ether.fi, and Maple are also experimenting with similar tokenomics strategies. Aave's move signifies a positive step in aligning protocol revenues with tokenholder interests.
news.headline: AAVE jumps 13% after buyback proposal is approved by 99% of tokenholders, allowing $4 million in tokens to be purchased, aiming for $1 million weekly buybacks for 6 months. Market cap hits $2.1 billion. Trend of DeFi protocols implementing buybacks grows amid increasing demand by tokenholders. Several projects, including Ethena, Ether.fi, and Maple, exploring value-accrual mechanisms for native tokens to distribute protocol revenues to stakeholders, propelled by a friendlier US regulatory environment. Aave stands out as the most popular DeFi protocol with TVL over $17.5 billion and annualized fee income of $350 million.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, a recent press release announced an update to a previous news item dated April 2, 2025. The update included the addition of an Innovation Award received by British American Tobacco (BAT) for their pioneering utilization of Kinaxis technology. BAT collaborated to develop the inaugural production wheel and interchangeability features, bolstering constraint oversight, SKU shifts, and automation within their operations. The refreshed release now states: KINAXIS HONORS SUPPLY CHAIN TRAILBLAZERS WITH 2025 CUSTOMER AWARDS AT KINEXIONS, applauding outstanding companies and individuals.
news.headline: Kinaxis awards British American Tobacco with Innovation Award for pioneering Kinaxis technology.

news.summary: In Portage, Michigan, on April 9, 2025, Charles Zhang, CFP®, achieved the impressive ranking of #4 on Forbes' America's Top Wealth Advisors for 2025 list. Notably, he holds the distinction of being the highest-ranked fee-only advisor on the prestigious list. Additionally, according to Forbes, Charles was named as the top Financial Advisor in Michigan for the same year.
news.headline: Charles Zhang is ranked #4 in the nation and #1 in Michigan by Forbes for 2025 among top wealth advisors.

news.summary: President Donald Trump has announced plans for a major tariff on foreign pharmaceuticals, which he believes will incentivize companies to move production out of countries like China. Trump stated that these tariffs will be at unprecedented levels and will be announced soon. Previously, pharmaceuticals were excluded from new tariffs, providing relief to the industry after Trump's comments about imposing a 25% tariff. Additionally, Trump declared a 90-day pause on tariffs for countries not retaliating against the U.S. This announcement led to a market rally and decreased volatility. Trump also criticized China for lack of respect and announced a 125% tariff hike on Chinese goods. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trump hints at major tariffs on foreign pharmaceuticals, promising levels never seen before. Plans to announce tariffs soon. Excluded pharma from new tariffs last week, but now announces 90-day pause for certain countries. Full details on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Cogeco Communications Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending February 28, 2025. Revenue increased by 0.3% to $732.4 million compared to the previous year. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 2.7% to $356.5 million. Profit for the period was $79.6 million, attributable to owners at $74.7 million. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.922 per share, marking an 8.0% increase. Net capital expenditures were $157.9 million, with free cash flow at $116.6 million. The three-year transformation program has led to increased customer satisfaction and ongoing cost reductions. Canadian wireless launch preparation is on track. Board of Directors maintains fiscal 2025 financial guidelines. Fibre-to-the-home network expansion saw approximately 7,000 homes passed during the quarter. Acquisition of property, plant, and equipment decreased by 11.6% to $159.4 million.
news.headline: Cogeco Communications released Q2 fiscal 2025 results with revenue at $732.4M, an increase of 0.3%, while adjusted EBITDA rose to $356.5M. Profit for the period was $79.6M. Quarterly dividend declared at $0.922, representing an 8.0% increase. MONTRÉAL, April 9, 2025 (CNW).
